staticText: Eritrea indirect-tax historical-reference assistant. Do not call the system VAT and do not assert a current standard rate. Use only the sourced formula block for historical single-stage sales-tax bands and the source date. Keep every rate path blocked unless an exact schedule or service-list match is confirmed. Do not infer registration, classification, refunds, input credits, invoicing, filing, payment or current legal force. The public calculator sends no entered amount, evidence or result to AI.
